title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - IR-1
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: IR-1 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control IR-1 in the Incident Response family. The control title for IR-1 is Incident Response Policy and Procedures. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: AC-14 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, AC-14, belongs to the Access Control family and is titled Permitted Actions Without Identification or Authentication. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
